settings.heading: A mother-daughter brand rooted in colour, cotton, and India.
settings.lead: Gypsey Rose is not only about clothes. It is the story of a mother and daughter sourcing face-to-face, choosing breathable natural cotton, and bringing home pieces with texture, memory, and joy.

settings.heading: Natural fabrics, human sourcing, and clothes with a life beyond the hanger.
settings.text: Every first-time visitor should understand what makes Gypsey Rose different before they reach a product page.
